content: I want to add typed exception classes for the payment service. Right now everything throws a generic Exception.

Good call. I'll create a base PaymentError class and typed subclasses: PaymentDeclinedError, InsufficientFundsError, and PaymentGatewayError. Each will carry the transaction_id so callers can correlate logs.
Yes. Also add a CardExpiredError. The gateway returns a specific code for that.

Added CardExpiredError(PaymentError) with a card_last_four attribute. All four subclasses are in payments/exceptions.py. Updated the gateway adapter to raise the correct type based on the response code.
